record.field: Plane is a modern, open-source project management platform and a self-hosted alternative to Jira, Linear, Monday, and ClickUp.

Plane is a modern, open-source project management platform and a self-hosted alternative to Jira, Linear, Monday, and ClickUp.

It unifies issue tracking, sprint planning, product roadmaps, and documentation in a single workspace. Built for software and product teams, Plane combines flexible work-item management with cycles (sprints), modules (epics), pages with AI-assisted writing, and analytics. The AGPL Community Edition is fully self-hostable with no limits on users or projects, giving teams complete ownership of their data.

Key features
  • Work items with rich text, file attachments, custom properties, and filtered views
  • Cycles (sprints) with burn-down charts and module-based epic organization
  • Pages and wiki for notes and documentation, with AI-assisted writing
  • Roadmaps, real-time analytics, and triage/intake workflows
  • Multiple views: list, kanban board, calendar, and gantt/timeline
  • Self-hostable via Docker, Podman, or Kubernetes with full instance admin controls
Best for

Software, product, and engineering teams that want a self-hosted, data-owned alternative to commercial project trackers, plus organizations needing project management, sprints, and documentation in one privacy-respecting workspace.

services: web: image: makeplane/plane-frontend:${APP_RELEASE:-v0.27.1} command: node web/server.js web depends_on: - api - worker env_file: - .env container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}_web' restart: unless-stopped networks: - internal space: image: makeplane/plane-space:${APP_RELEASE:-v0.27.1} command: node space/server.js space depends_on: - api - worker - web env_file: - .env container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}_space' restart: unless-stopped networks: - internal admin: image: makeplane/plane-admin:${APP_RELEASE:-v0.27.1} command: node admin/server.js admin depends_on: - api - web env_file: - .env container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}_admin' restart: unless-stopped networks: - internal live: image: makeplane/plane-live:${APP_RELEASE:-v0.27.1} command: node live/dist/server.js live depends_on: - api - web env_file: - .env container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}_live' restart: unless-stopped networks: - internal api: image: makeplane/plane-backend:${APP_RELEASE:-v0.27.1} command: ./bin/docker-entrypoint-api.sh volumes: - ./logs_api:/code/plane/logs depends_on: - plane-db - plane-redis - plane-mq env_file: - .env container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}_api' restart: unless-stopped networks: - internal worker: image: makeplane/plane-backend:${APP_RELEASE:-v0.27.1} command: ./bin/docker-entrypoint-worker.sh volumes: - ./logs_worker:/code/plane/logs depends_on: - api - plane-db - plane-redis - plane-mq env_file: - .env container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}_worker' restart: unless-stopped networks: - internal beat-worker: image: makeplane/plane-backend:${APP_RELEASE:-v0.27.1} command: ./bin/docker-entrypoint-beat.sh volumes: - ./logs_beat_worker:/code/plane/logs depends_on: - api - plane-db - plane-redis - plane-mq env_file: - .env container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}_beat_worker' restart: unless-stopped networks: - internal migrator: image: makeplane/plane-backend:${APP_RELEASE:-v0.27.1} command: ./bin/docker-entrypoint-migrator.sh volumes: - ./logs_migrator:/code/plane/logs depends_on: - plane-db - plane-redis env_file: - .env container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}_migrator' restart: unless-stopped networks: - internal plane-db: image: postgres:17-alpine command: postgres -c 'max_connections=1000' volumes: - ./pgdata:/var/lib/postgresql/data env_file: - .env container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}_plane_db' restart: unless-stopped networks: - internal plane-redis: image: valkey/valkey:7.2.5-alpine volumes: - ./redisdata:/data env_file: - .env container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}_plane_redis' restart: unless-stopped networks: - internal plane-mq: image: rabbitmq:3.13.6-management-alpine volumes: - ./rabbitmq_data:/var/lib/rabbitmq env_file: - .env container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}_plane_mq' restart: unless-stopped networks: - internal plane-minio: image: minio/minio:latest command: server /export --console-address ":9090" volumes: - ./uploads:/export env_file: - .env container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}_plane_minio' restart: unless-stopped networks: - internal proxy: image: makeplane/plane-proxy:${APP_RELEASE:-v0.27.1} depends_on: - web - api - space env_file: - .env container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}' restart: unless-stopped ports: - '{{ PORT_HTTP }}:80' networks: - internal - agz-proxy-network networks: internal: driver: bridge agz-proxy-network: external: true

#!/bin/bash set -euo pipefail cd "$SERVICE_PATH" # Dump consistente de PostgreSQL (servicio en marcha) → $BACKUP_DATA_DIR docker compose exec -T plane-db sh -c 'pg_dump -U "$POSTGRES_USER" -d "$POSTGRES_DB" --no-owner -Fc' \ > "$BACKUP_DATA_DIR/db.dump" echo "pg_dump OK ($(wc -c < "$BACKUP_DATA_DIR/db.dump") bytes)"

#!/bin/bash set -euo pipefail cd "$SERVICE_PATH" # Levanta solo la DB, espera readiness y restaura docker compose up -d plane-db for i in $(seq 1 30); do docker compose exec -T plane-db sh -c 'pg_isready -U "$POSTGRES_USER"' && break sleep 2 done docker compose exec -T plane-db sh -c 'pg_restore -U "$POSTGRES_USER" -d "$POSTGRES_DB" --clean --if-exists --no-owner' \ < "$RESTORE_DATA_DIR/db.dump" # Verificación: la DB no quedó vacía (sh -c con dobles comillas; $VAR del contenedor con \$) N=$(docker compose exec -T plane-db sh -c "psql -U \$POSTGRES_USER -d \$POSTGRES_DB -tAc \"SELECT count(*) FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema='public'\"") echo "tablas restauradas: $N" test "$N" -gt 0
